summary: Structural range and symmetry breakout workflow with pivot analysis, candlestick confirmation, and volume-assisted breakout validation.
core_logic: Detect pivots and structural ranges from historical price action.
Build box, range, or symmetry patterns from those pivots.
Trigger on structural breakout, then confirm with price-action candles and volume participation.
Use structure boundaries as risk references.
recommended_next_step: Keep this case in-package as a documented target and convert it only after a dedicated structure-detection layer exists.
